log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Githyanki — Bardic Musician.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Githyanki — Bardic Musician (distant).
--- Githyanki — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
